name: pi-session-ask
description_en: Allows the agent or user to ask questions about the current session's pre-compaction history, parent (if forked) sessions' histories, or any other sessions' histories, via a subagent (keeping current context clean).
description_zh: 允许代理或用户通过子代理询问当前会话的预压缩历史记录、父级（如果已分叉）会话历史记录或任何其他会话历史记录，同时保持当前上下文清洁
